Jan van Eyck visited the moving court of this dynasty during a plague outbreak to paint a portrait of its Princess Isabella for her future husband Philip the Good. After a disastrous defeat, a member of this dynasty with the epithet “Holy Prince” became a hostage to the (*) Marinids. Philippa of Lancaster was the mother of this dynasty’s “Illustrious Generation” of princes. After disappearing at the Battle of Alcácer Quibir, this dynasty’s king Sebastian I gained the epithet “the Desired”. This dynasty’s founder defeated Castile at the Battle of Aljubarrota. Ruling from 1385 to 1580, for 10 points, name this dynasty which included Henry the Navigator, founded by John I of Portugal.
